# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

type: compute.v1.firewall
name: firewall-ssh
properties:
  network: global/networks/default
  direction: INGRESS
  priority: 1000
  allowed:
  - IPProtocol: tcp
    ports:
    - "22"
  sourceRanges:
  - "0.0.0.0/0"

type: compute.v1.firewall
name: firewall-rdp
properties:
  network: global/networks/default
  direction: INGRESS
  priority: 1000
  allowed:
  - IPProtocol: tcp
    ports:
    - "3389"
  sourceRanges:
  - "0.0.0.0/0"

type: compute.v1.firewall
name: firewall-http
properties:
  network: global/networks/default
  direction: INGRESS
  priority: 1000
  allowed:
  - IPProtocol: tcp
    ports:
    - "80"
  sourceRanges:
  - "0.0.0.0/0"

type: compute.v1.firewall
name: firewall-https
properties:
  network: global/networks/default
  direction: INGRESS
  priority: 1000
  allowed:
  - IPProtocol: tcp
    ports:
    - "443"
  sourceRanges:
  - "0.0.0.0/0"
